{{Navbox
|name  = Evolutionary psychology
|state = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
|title = [[Evolutionary psychology]]
|bodyclass = hlist
|groupstyle = text-align:left;

|above=
* [[History of evolutionary psychology|History]]
* [[Theoretical foundations of evolutionary psychology|Theoretical foundations]]
* [[Criticism of evolutionary psychology|Criticism]]

|group1 = [[Human evolution|Processes]]
|list1  =
* [[Psychological adaptation|Adaptations]]
* [[Altruism (biology)|Altruism]]
** [[Cheating (biology)|Cheating]]
** [[Reciprocal altruism in humans|Reciprocal]]
* [[Baldwin effect]]
* [[Spandrel (biology)|By-products]]
* [[Cognitive module]]
** [[Automatic and controlled processes|Automatic/Controlled]]
* [[Evolutionarily stable strategy]]
* [[Exaptation]]
* [[Fitness (biology)|Fitness]]
** [[Inclusive fitness in humans|Inclusive]]
* [[Kin selection]]
* [[Evolutionary mismatch|Mismatch]]
* [[Natural selection]]
* [[Parental investment]]
* [[Sexual selection in humans|Sexual selection]]
** [[Sexual selection#Male intrasexual competition|Male]]/[[Female intrasexual competition]]
** [[Mate choice]]
** [[Sexual dimorphism]]
* [[Social selection]]

|group2 = Areas
|list2  =
* [[Evolutionary aesthetics|Aesthetics]]
** [[Darwinian literary studies|Literary criticism]]
** [[Evolutionary musicology|Musicology]]
* [[Evolutionary anthropology|Anthropology]]
** [[Biological anthropology|Biological]]
* [[Biosocial criminology|Crime]]
** [[Lead–crime hypothesis]]
* [[Evolutionary psychology and culture|Culture]]
** [[Behavioral modernity]]
** [[Cultural universal|Universals]]
* [[Evolutionary developmental psychology|Development]]
** [[Attachment theory|Attachment]]
** [[Human bonding|Bonding]]
** [[Affectional bond|Affectional]]/[[Maternal bond|Maternal]]/[[Paternal bond]]
** [[Maternal deprivation|Caregiver deprivation]]
** [[Attachment in children|Childhood attachment]]
** [[Cognitive development]]
** [[Personality development]]
** [[Socialization]]
* [[Evolutionary educational psychology|Education]]
* [[Evolution of emotion|Emotion]]
** [[Affect (psychology)|Affect]]
** [[Affect display]]
** [[Display rules]]
** [[Facial expression]]
** [[Fight-or-flight response]]
* [[Evolution of human intelligence|Intelligence]]
** [[Flynn effect]]
** [[Human multitasking|Multitasking]]
** [[Theory of mind]]
** [[Wason selection task]]
* [[Evolutionary linguistics|Language]]
** [[Origin of language|Origin]]
** [[Evolutionary psychology of language|Psychology]]
** [[Origin of speech|Speech]]
* [[Evolutionary psychiatry|Mental health]]
** [[Cinderella effect]]
** [[Evolutionary approaches to depression|Depression]]
** [[Digital media use and mental health]]
** [[Accident-proneness|Hypophobia]]
** [[Mind-blindness]]
** [[Rank theory of depression]]
** [[Evolution of schizophrenia|Schizophrenia]]
** [[Screen time]]
** [[Mental disorders and gender|Sex differences]]
* [[Evolution of morality|Morality]]
** [[Moral foundations theory|Moral foundations]]
* [[Evolutionary psychology of religion|Religion]]
** [[Evolutionary origin of religions|Origin]]
* [[Sex differences in psychology|Sex differences]]
** [[Sex differences in autism|Autism]]
** [[Sex differences in cognition|Cognition]]
** [[Sex differences in crime|Crime]]
** [[Sexual division of labour|Division of labour]]
** [[Sex differences in emotional intelligence|Emotional intelligence]]
** [[Empathising–systemising theory]]
** [[Sex differences in intelligence|Intelligence]]
** [[Sex differences in memory|Memory]]
** [[Sex differences in narcissism|Narcissism]]
** [[Sex differences in schizophrenia|Schizophrenia]]
** [[Gender differences in suicide|Suicide]]
** [[Variability hypothesis]]
* [[Human sexuality|Sexuality]]
** [[Human male sexuality|Male]]/[[Human female sexuality|Female]]
** [[Human sexual activity|Activity]]
** [[Attachment in adults|Adult attachment]]
** [[Age disparity in sexual relationships|Age disparity]]
** [[Coolidge effect]]
** [[Sexual desire|Desire]]
** [[Sexual fantasy|Fantasy]]
** [[Sexual jealousy|Jealousy]]
** [[Mate guarding in humans|Mate guarding]]
** [[Mating preferences]]
** [[Human mating strategies|Mating strategies]]
** [[Biology and sexual orientation|Orientation]]
** [[Pair bond]]
** [[Physical attractiveness|Physical]]/[[Sexual attraction]]
** [[Sexy son hypothesis]]
** [[Westermarck effect]]

|group3 = [[List of evolutionary psychologists|People]]
|list3  = {{Navbox|child

  |group1 = Biologists /<br>neuroscientists
  |list1  =
* [[John Crook (ethologist)|John Crook]]
* [[Charles Darwin]]
* [[Richard Dawkins]]
* [[Jared Diamond]]
* [[W. D. Hamilton]]
* [[Peter Kropotkin]]
* [[Gordon Orians]]
* [[Jaak Panksepp]]
* [[Margie Profet]]
* [[Peter Richerson]]
* [[Giacomo Rizzolatti]]
* [[Randy Thornhill]]
* [[Robert Trivers]]
* [[Carel van Schaik]]
* [[Claus Wedekind]]
* [[Mary Jane West-Eberhard]]
* [[Wolfgang Wickler]]
* [[George Christopher Williams|George C. Williams]]
* [[David Sloan Wilson]]
* [[E. O. Wilson]]
* [[Richard Wrangham]]

  |group2 = Anthropologists
  |list2 = 
* [[Jerome H. Barkow]]
* [[Christopher Boehm]]
* [[Robert Boyd (anthropologist)|Robert Boyd]]
* [[Donald Brown (anthropologist)|Donald E. Brown]]
* [[Napoleon Chagnon]]
* [[Robin Dunbar]]
* [[Daniel Fessler]]
* [[Mark Flinn]]
* [[John D. Hawks]]
* [[Joseph Henrich]]
* [[Ruth Mace]]
* [[Daniel Nettle]]
* [[Stephen Shennan]]
* [[Donald Symons]]
* [[John Tooby]]
* [[Pierre L. van den Berghe|Pierre van den Berghe]]

  |group3 = Behavioral economists&nbsp;/<br>political scientists
  |list3 = 
* [[Samuel Bowles (economist)|Samuel Bowles]]
* [[Ernst Fehr]]
* [[Herbert Gintis]]
* [[Dominic D. P. Johnson]]
* [[Gad Saad]]

  |group4 = Literary theorists&nbsp;/<br>philosophers
  |list4 = 
* [[Edmund Burke]]
* [[Joseph Carroll (scholar)|Joseph Carroll]]
* [[Daniel Dennett]]
* [[Denis Dutton]]
* [[Thomas Hobbes]]
* [[David Hume]]

  |group5 = Psychologists&nbsp;/<br>cognitive scientists
  |list5 = 
* [[Mary Ainsworth]]
* [[Simon Baron-Cohen]]
* [[Justin L. Barrett]]
* [[Jay Belsky]]
* [[Jesse Bering]]
* [[David F. Bjorklund]]
* [[Paul Bloom (psychologist)|Paul Bloom]]
* [[John Bowlby]]
* [[Pascal Boyer]]
* [[Joseph Bulbulia]]
* [[David Buss]]
* [[Josep Call]]
* [[Anne Campbell (academic)|Anne Campbell]]
* [[Donald T. Campbell]]
* [[Peter Carruthers (philosopher)|Peter Carruthers]]
* [[Noam Chomsky]]
* [[Leda Cosmides]]
* [[Martin Daly (professor)|Martin Daly]]
* [[Paul Ekman]]
* [[Bruce J. Ellis]]
* [[Anne Fernald]]
* [[Aurelio José Figueredo]]
* [[Diana Fleischman]]
* [[Uta Frith]]
* [[David C. Geary]]
* [[Gerd Gigerenzer]]
* [[Jonathan Haidt]]
* [[Harry Harlow]]
* [[Judith Rich Harris]]
* [[Rachel and Stephen Kaplan|Stephen Kaplan]]
* [[Douglas T. Kenrick]]
* [[Simon M. Kirby]]
* [[Robert Kurzban]]
* [[Brian MacWhinney]]
* [[Michael T. McGuire]]
* [[Geoffrey Miller (psychologist)|Geoffrey Miller]]
* [[Darcia Narvaez]]
* [[Katherine Nelson]]
* [[Randolph M. Nesse]]
* [[Steven Neuberg]]
* [[David Perrett]]
* [[Steven Pinker]]
* [[Paul Rozin]]
* [[Mark Schaller]]
* [[David P. Schmitt]]
* [[Nancy Segal]]
* [[Todd K. Shackelford]]
* [[Roger Shepard]]
* [[Irwin Silverman]]
* [[Peter K. Smith]]
* [[Dan Sperber]]
* [[Anthony Stevens (Jungian analyst)|Anthony Stevens]]
* [[Frank Sulloway]]
* [[Michael Tomasello]]
* [[Mark van Vugt]]
* [[Andrew Whiten]]
* [[Glenn Wilson (psychologist)|Glenn Wilson]]
* [[Margo Wilson]]
}}

|group4 = [[Evolutionary psychology research groups and centers|Research centers/<br>organizations]]
|list4 =
* [[Center for Evolutionary Psychology]]
* [[Human Behavior and Evolution Society]]
* [[Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology]]
* [[Max Planck Institute for Human Cognitive and Brain Sciences]]
* [[New England Complex Systems Institute]]

|group5 = Publications
|list5  =
* ''[[The Adapted Mind]]''
* ''[[Evolution and Human Behavior]]''
* ''[[The Evolution of Human Sexuality]]''
* ''[[Evolution, Mind and Behaviour]]''
* ''[[Evolutionary Behavioral Sciences]]''
* ''[[Evolutionary Psychology (journal)|Evolutionary Psychology]]''

|group6 = Related subjects
|list6  =
* [[Adaptationism]]
* [[Behavioral economics|Behavioral]]/[[Evolutionary economics]]
* [[Behavioral epigenetics]]
* [[Behavioural genetics]]
* [[Behavioral neuroscience|Behavioral]]/[[Cognitive neuroscience|Cognitive]]/[[Evolutionary neuroscience]]
* [[Biocultural anthropology]]
* [[Cognitive science]]
** [[Cognitive psychology]]
** [[Cognitivism (psychology)|Cognitivism]]
** [[Computational theory of mind]]
** [[Functionalism (philosophy of mind)|Functionalism]]
** [[Philosophy of mind]]
* [[Cultural evolution]]
** [[Cultural selection theory]]
** [[Memetics]]
** [[Multilineal evolution]]
** [[Neoevolutionism]]
** [[Sociocultural evolution]]
** [[Unilineal evolution]]
* [[Determinism]]/[[Indeterminism]]
** [[Biological determinism]]
** [[Connectionism]]
** [[Cultural determinism]]
** [[Environmental determinism]]
** [[Nature versus nurture]]
** [[Psychological nativism]]
** [[Social constructionism]]
** [[Social determinism]]
** [[Standard social science model]]
* [[Ethology]]
* [[Evolutionary medicine]]
** [[Criticism of Facebook]]
** [[Human factors and ergonomics]]
** [[Social aspects of television]]
** [[Texting while driving]]
* [[Functional psychology]]
* [[Modularity of mind]]
** [[Domain-general learning|Domain generality]]
** [[Domain specificity]]
** [[Dual process theory]]
* [[Primatology]]
* [[Sociobiology]]
* [[Unit of selection]]
** [[Coevolution]]
** [[Cultural group selection]]
** [[Dual inheritance theory]]
** [[Gene-centered view of evolution]]
** [[Group selection]]
** [[Hologenome theory of evolution|Hologenome theory]]
** [[Lamarckism]]
** [[Punctuated equilibrium]]
** [[Recent human evolution]]
** [[Transgenerational epigenetic inheritance]]

|below= 
* {{icon|category}}&nbsp;'''[[:Category:Evolutionary psychology|Evolutionary psychology]]'''
* {{icon|portal}}&nbsp;'''[[Portal:Psychology|Psychology portal]]'''
* {{icon|portal}}&nbsp;'''[[Portal:evolutionary biology|Evolutionary biology portal]]'''

}}<noinclude>
{{doc|content=
{{collapsible option}}
[[Category:Psychology navigational boxes]]
[[Category:Evolution templates]]
[[Category:Evolutionary psychology|*]]
}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
